title: Second shortlisted story of the Science Fiction and Information Law Writing Competition
content:
As part of the fourth IViR Science Fiction and Information Law competition, DigiCon will publish the stories of the finalists every week. The winning stories will be revealed during the CPDP 2026 conference in Brussels on 19-22 May.
The post Second shortlisted story of the Science Fiction and Information Law Writing Competition appeared first on IVIR.

https://www.ivir.nl/second-shortlisted-story-of-the-science-fiction-and-informat…
